title: Secretly, Greatly
tmdbOverview: Three elite North Korean sleeper agents live under cover for so long that they believe their cover stories are their real identities. They are shocked when they are ordered to kill one another or face death at the hands of an elite hit team.
synopsis: Released in 2013, Secretly, Greatly is a action, drama and comedy film from South Korea. It carries a 6.8 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R18+ certification (JP rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
